title: MCIP v1 shared definitions
description: Definitions shared by every MathCorpus Interchange Protocol (MCIP) v1 record schema. Not a record type itself — referenced via $ref from the per-record schemas in this directory. See README.md for canonicalization, hashing, and version-negotiation rules.

mcip_version.description: MCIP protocol version this record was produced under. Major version 1 for this schema generation.

iso_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp, RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 with a trailing Z.

packet_id.description: MathCorpus packet_id this evidence record is about (schema/packet.schema.json).

record_id.description: Stable identifier for this evidence record, unique within its record_type.

trust_status.description: Evidentiary trust of this record. Distinct from MathCorpus packet trust.rung — an MCIP record is child evidence, never itself proof authority for a packet.

export_eligibility.description: Default export posture for this record as a whole. Model-related records additionally carry public_metadata for redaction-aware partial export.

artifact_hashes.description: Map of artifact name -> sha256 for artifacts this record's claims depend on (e.g. trajectory_db, diagnostics_blob, model_weights_manifest).

public_metadata.description: Redaction-aware subset of this record's fields considered safe for public export even when the full record is restricted. Deliberately not additionalProperties:false — its shape is policy-defined per issue #8 and may grow without a schema bump.
